hero.name: Jeevitha A
hero.tagline: SOC Analyst in Training · Threat Hunter · CTF Player

paragraphs: Cybersecurity enthusiast pursuing a BCA in Cyber Security at Hindustan University (GPA: 9.09), with hands-on experience in SOC operations and real-time incident response.
Passionate about threat detection, log analysis, and ethical hacking — especially vulnerability assessment and red teaming.
I aim to master both defense and offense to become a well-rounded cyber professional — bridging the gap between the blue team and the red team.
Active CTF player on TryHackMe (NilaHack) and HackTheBox. Certified in multiple cybersecurity domains and constantly sharpening my skills on real-world platforms.

education.institution: Christ King Girls Hr Sec School

projects.title: Real-Time ML-Based Log Anomaly Detection
projects.shortDescription: End-to-end pipeline that ingests raw system logs, performs NLP preprocessing, and applies machine learning for real-time anomaly scoring with live dashboard visualisation.
features: Raw log ingestion and NLP preprocessing pipeline
Interactive dashboards for trends and security insights
Rapid threat detection and alert visualization

projects.title: Automated Web VAPT Reporting Tool
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack web platform to manage vulnerability assessments and auto-generate professional, audit-ready security reports with centralized vuln knowledge base.
features: Centralized vulnerability knowledge base with severity ratings
Custom tester observations without overwriting standard data
Auto-generated executive summaries and action plans
PDF and Docs export for audit-ready reports

highlights: Immersed in Security Operations Center (SOC) workflows
Real-time threat monitoring and incident response
Gained expertise in log analysis and SIEM tools

experience.role: MS Word Intern — Malay Court Files
highlights: Corrected legal file formatting and errors
Designed certificates and cover pages professionally

achievements.title: TCS HackQuest CTF
achievements.detail: Cleared 2 rounds — solved JavaScript deobfuscation, DoH traffic analysis, Base64 decoding, and API security testing challenges.

achievements.title: PEC Capture The Flag (Solo)
achievements.detail: Secured 7th place — demonstrated skills in cryptography, OSINT, steganography, and reverse engineering.

achievements.title: Cybertron CTF
achievements.detail: Ranked #34 with 4430 points in a Jeopardy-style 30-hour CTF event.

writeups.title: DoH Traffic Analysis — TCS HackQuest Writeup
